title: Bright & Homely De-Icer Spray (12x 600ml) – Fast-Acting Car Deicer for Windscreens, Windows & Mirrors – Quick Defrost Formula for Winter Driving – Effective Ice Remover Spray for Vehicles (12)
features: POWERFUL 600ML DE-ICER SPRAY – Rapid ice-melting formula clears frost and ice from car windscreens, mirrors, windows, and locks within seconds for safer, clearer winter driving.
EASY-USE CAR ICE REMOVER – Ergonomic trigger spray delivers even coverage, ensuring fast and streak-free defrosting without scratching glass or damaging surfaces.
SAFE & EFFECTIVE ON MULTIPLE SURFACES – Suitable for use on glass, paintwork, mirrors, doors, and locks, this advanced de-icer spray removes ice while protecting vehicle finishes.
WINTER DRIVING ESSENTIAL – Prevents frozen locks and frosted windows, helping drivers save time, reduce hassle, and stay safe during harsh winter conditions.
LARGE 600ML BOTTLE – Generous single pack provides plenty of de-icer for repeated use throughout the winter season, keeping your vehicle clear and safe in freezing conditions.
description: POWERFUL 600ML DE-ICER SPRAY – Rapid ice-melting formula clears frost and ice from car windscreens, mirrors, windows, and locks within seconds for safer, clearer winter driving.
